jupyterToken.description: Authentication token for the Jupyter server. Generated automatically by start-jpy.sh and saved in environment. Required for secure access to the Jupyter server.

jupyterUrl.description: URL of the Jupyter Lab server. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8888. Used to construct notebook access URLs and verify connectivity.

notebookDir.description: Physical directory path where notebooks are stored on the Jupyter server. Used with defaultNotebook to auto-increment notebook names (e.g., ~/.openclaw/jupyter_home). Relative paths are resolved from Jupyter root.

defaultNotebook.description: Default notebook name used when creating new notebooks without explicit path. Defaults to 'Untitled' if not specified. Auto-increments to Untitled-1, Untitled-2, etc. if files exist.

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for Jupyter operations. Default: 30000 (30 seconds). Increase for slow networks or long-running operations.
